name: Dolmeh Seeb-Zamini
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry onions in cooking oil over medium heat until golden.
2. Add ground meat and fry further until the meat changes color.
3. Add 1/2 cup water, salt, pepper, and tomato paste. Mix well and cook further until the water boils off.
4. Fry prepared vegetables (parsley, mint, spring onions) in cooking oil over medium heat until wilted.
5. Mix well the meat mixture with the cooked vegetables.
6. Peel and mash potatoes. Add raw eggs, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
7. Take a handful of potato-mix and shape it into a ball. Create a hole in the middle and fill with the meat mix. Cover with some more potato-mix and shape into a disc.
8. Repeat until both mixes are used up.
9. Fry both sides of the discs in cooking oil over medium heat until golden.
10. Serve with slices of tomatoes and bits of parsley.
